name: AI Chatbot
description: Beautiful chat interface with OpenAI integration and variable access

blocks.name: Chatbot UI

fields.name: contextVariables
fields.label: Variables to expose (comma separated)
fields.placeholder: myVar, counter, data or * for all

blocks.exportCode: `(function() { const apiKey = ${b.getValue('apiKey')}; const config = { title: ${b.getValue('title')}, apiKey: apiKey, model: '${b.getValue('model')}', systemPrompt: ${b.getValue('systemPrompt')}, contextVariables: ${b.getValue('contextVariables')}, target: '${b.getValue('target')}' }; if(typeof window.__createChatbot === 'function') { window.__createChatbot(config); } else { console.error('Chatbot UI not loaded'); } })();`

blocks.name: Send Message
blocks.exportCode: `(function() { const message = ${b.getValue('message')}; const target = '${b.getValue('target')}'; if(typeof window.__sendChatMessage === 'function') { window.__sendChatMessage(message, target); } else { console.error('Chatbot not initialized'); } })();`
